title: Accounting Associate
description: Robert Half is seeking an Accounting Associate for a direct-hire position with a growing professional services firm in Miami. This role offers hands-on experience across the full accounting function, from general ledger maintenance to month-end close procedures. You'll work with an experienced accounting team in a client-focused organization that values precision and professional development.
responsibilities: Post and reconcile journal entries in the general ledger; investigate and resolve discrepancies
Support accounts payable and accounts receivable functions, including invoice processing and payment reconciliation
Prepare and maintain account reconciliations for balance sheet accounts
Assist with month-end and year-end close procedures, including accrual entries and adjustments
Prepare financial statements and supporting schedules under supervision of the accounting manager

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Accounting or Finance
skills: Proficiency in accounting software (QuickBooks, NetSuite preferred)
Strong Excel skills for financial analysis and reporting
Solid understanding of accounting principles and GAAP
Excellent attention to detail and organizational abilities
Clear communication and ability to work cross-functionally

benefits: Paid time off and paid holidays
Direct hire opportunity with growth potential
